content:
# 弹窗结构

## 使用场景

需要用户关注或确认操作时弹出的模态对话框。适用于删除确认、信息提示、表单填写、操作确认等需要打断用户流程获取响应的场景。

## 布局结构

分层结构：底层半透明遮罩（覆盖全屏）+ 上层弹窗面板（居中定位）。弹窗面板从上到下：标题区 → 内容区 → 底部按钮区（取消 + 确认）。

弹窗宽度 420px，圆角 12px，白色背景。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "modal-dialog-root",
  "name": "弹窗对话框",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
    "size": { "width": 375, "height": 812 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 100,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "modal-overlay",
      "name": "遮罩层",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 375, "height": 812 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 0.45
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#000000" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "group",
      "id": "modal-panel",
      "name": "弹窗面板",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 28, "y": 280 },
        "size": { "width": 320, "height": 220 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "children": [
        {
          "type": "rect",
          "id": "modal-panel-bg",
          "name": "弹窗背景",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
            "size": { "width": 320, "height": 220 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 0,
          "locked": false,
          "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
          "cornerRadius": 12
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "id": "modal-title",
          "name": "弹窗标题",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 24, "y": 20 },
            "size": { "width": 272, "height": 24 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 1,
          "locked": false,
          "content": "确认删除",
          "style": { "fontSize": 16, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "id": "modal-content",
          "name": "弹窗内容",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 24, "y": 60 },
            "size": { "width": 272, "height": 60 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 1,
          "locked": false,
          "content": "确定要删除这条记录吗？删除后将无法恢复，请谨慎操作。",
          "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#8C8C8C", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
        },
        {
          "type": "rect",
          "id": "modal-cancel-btn-bg",
          "name": "取消按钮背景",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 24, "y": 152 },
            "size": { "width": 128, "height": 40 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 1,
          "locked": false,
          "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
          "stroke": { "color": "#d9d9d9", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
          "cornerRadius": 6
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "id": "modal-cancel-btn-text",
          "name": "取消按钮文本",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 24, "y": 162 },
            "size": { "width": 128, "height": 20 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 2,
          "locked": false,
          "content": "取消",
          "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
        },
        {
          "type": "rect",
          "id": "modal-confirm-btn-bg",
          "name": "确认按钮背景",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 168, "y": 152 },
            "size": { "width": 128, "height": 40 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 1,
          "locked": false,
          "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#FF4D4F" },
          "cornerRadius": 6
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "id": "modal-confirm-btn-text",
          "name": "确认按钮文本",
          "transform": {
            "position": { "x": 168, "y": 162 },
            "size": { "width": 128, "height": 20 },
            "rotation": 0,
            "opacity": 1
          },
          "zIndex": 2,
          "locked": false,
          "content": "确认删除",
          "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#ffffff", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- 遮罩层使用黑色 #000000，透明度 0.45，覆盖整个页面
- 弹窗面板水平居中，垂直偏上（约 1/3 位置），白色背景，圆角 12px
- 标题区 16px 加粗，内容区 14px 灰色次要文字
- 底部按钮区两个按钮等宽并排：取消（白色背景 + 灰色边框）+ 确认（危险操作用红色 #FF4D4F）
- 弹窗内边距 24px
- zIndex 使用较高值（100）确保遮罩覆盖底层内容
- 使用 group 嵌套：外层 group 包含遮罩 + 面板 group，面板 group 再包含具体内容

metadata.description: 弹窗结构：遮罩 + 标题 + 内容区 + 确认/取消按钮
